title: MergeDialog & Banner Amber Tokens, aria-busy & Icon Accessibility
description: Replace amber color classes with design tokens in MergeDialog and use warning tokens. Add aria-busy to loading buttons in MergeDialog, EmailVerificationBanner, Tags, and Settings. Add aria-hidden to FollowUpBanner decorative Bell icon and aria-label to its View button. Add sr-only loading text to TemplateBar.

userStories.title: Replace MergeDialog warning alert amber classes with design tokens
userStories.description: MergeDialog.jsx renders an Alert warning at ~line 82 with className 'border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 dark:border-amber-700 dark:bg-amber-900/30'. The AlertTriangle at line 83 has 'text-amber-600 dark:text-amber-400' and the AlertDescription at line 84 has 'text-amber-800 dark:text-amber-300'. Replace all these amber classes with warning design tokens: use 'border-warning/30 bg-warning/10' on the Alert, 'text-warning' on the AlertTriangle, and 'text-warning' on the AlertDescription.
acceptanceCriteria: MergeDialog.jsx Alert uses border-warning/30 bg-warning/10 instead of amber border/bg classes
MergeDialog.jsx AlertTriangle icon uses text-warning instead of text-amber-600 dark:text-amber-400
MergeDialog.jsx AlertDescription uses text-warning instead of text-amber-800 dark:text-amber-300

userStories.title: Add aria-busy to MergeDialog confirm merge button
userStories.description: MergeDialog.jsx confirm merge Button (~line 142) renders a Loader2 spinner when isPending is true but lacks aria-busy. Add aria-busy={isPending} to the confirm merge Button so screen readers announce the merge operation in progress.

userStories.title: Add aria-busy to EmailVerificationBanner resend button
userStories.description: EmailVerificationBanner.jsx resend email Button (~line 65) shows 'Sending…' text when isPending but lacks aria-busy. Add aria-busy={isPending} to the resend Button so screen readers announce the pending state.

userStories.title: Add aria-hidden to FollowUpBanner decorative Bell icon
userStories.description: FollowUpBanner.jsx renders a Bell icon at ~line 22 as decoration alongside the follow-up count text, but the Bell lacks aria-hidden='true'. Since the text already conveys the message, the Bell is purely decorative. Add aria-hidden='true' to the Bell icon.

userStories.title: Add aria-label to FollowUpBanner View button
userStories.description: FollowUpBanner.jsx renders a View button (~line 28) with only 'View' as its text content. Without more context, screen reader users may not know what they are viewing. Add aria-label='View follow-ups' to the View Button to provide a descriptive accessible name.
acceptanceCriteria: FollowUpBanner.jsx View Button has aria-label='View follow-ups'

userStories.title: Add aria-busy to Tags page delete confirmation button
userStories.description: Tags.jsx DeleteConfirmModal (~line 78) renders a destructive Delete Button with disabled={isPending} and shows 'Deleting…' when pending but lacks aria-busy. Add aria-busy={isPending} to the Delete Button in DeleteConfirmModal.
acceptanceCriteria: Tags.jsx DeleteConfirmModal Delete Button has aria-busy={isPending}

userStories.title: Add aria-busy to Settings.jsx save timezone button
userStories.description: Settings.jsx renders a Save timezone Button (~line 82) with disabled={isPending} but no aria-busy. Add aria-busy={isPending} to the Save timezone Button so screen readers announce the saving state.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings.jsx Save timezone Button has aria-busy={isPending}

userStories.title: Add sr-only loading text to TemplateBar loading state
userStories.description: TemplateBar.jsx renders an empty div when isLoading is true (~line 34), providing no accessible feedback that templates are loading. Replace the empty div with a div that contains a Loading templates… so screen reader users know the template selector is loading.
acceptanceCriteria: TemplateBar.jsx loading div contains a sr-only span with 'Loading templates…' text
